recipe_name: Mediterranean Chickpea Salad with Roasted Sweet Potato

instructions.instruction: Peel and cube the sweet potato and beetroot. Toss them in a little olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread the cubed sweet potato and beetroot on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for about 20 minutes until tender.
While the vegetables are roasting, rinse and drain the chickpeas. Cut the yellow bell pepper into small pieces and halve the cherry tomatoes.
In a large bowl, combine the lettuce, purple cabbage, chickpeas, yellow bell pepper, and cherry tomatoes.
Once the sweet potato and beetroot are roasted, add them to the salad bowl.
Slice the avocado and gently fold it into the salad.
Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss gently to combine.
Serve the salad topped with microgreens for garnish.

chef_tips: Use fresh, seasonal vegetables for the best flavor.
Feel free to add more spices or herbs to the dressing for an extra kick.
